steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: Text 1 shows Nebraska accepting damage from expansive soil rather than building to resist it; Text 2 demonstrates that pile supports significantly reduce this damage.

steps.title: Recommend the solution
steps.content:
Mostafiz and colleagues would recommend pile supports, their demonstrated mitigation for expansive soil damage.

This is the logical response to Nebraska's situation. The other choices propose interventions Text 2 doesn't discuss—measuring soil moisture, evaluating technique effectiveness, replacing supports on existing structures—or mischaracterize the research.

This is the correct answer.
